verdict.answer_first: Tie: both open with the direct answer, e.g. A says "HTTPS is just HTTP running inside a TLS tunnel" and B says the same.
verdict.decisiveness: B is more decisive because it ends with a compact mental model instead of offering follow-up branches; B says "Certificates answer... Diffie-Hellman answers... symmetric AEAD cipher answers..." while A asks "Want me to go deeper..."
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now: it gives the same core mechanism with less extra edge-case detail and a clearer final mental model.
